stories.hook: Guess who left this print.
stories.lead: You’d think it’s a big paw print, right? That’s why we all picture a wolf. But this one? It’s a raccoon. They walk on their toes, like tiny ballerinas, and their feet spread wide to grab branches. That’s why their prints look almost human-like. Still wonder why their paws look so much like ours?
